s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT SEPARATE TYPE SEAT BACK COVER (for Except Sports Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Using hog ring pliers, install the front separate type seat back cover to the front seat back pad with 10 new hog rings.

item.ptxt: Be careful not to damage the cover.
When installing the hog rings, take care to minimize wrinkles as much as possible.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT SEPARATE TYPE SEAT BACK COVER (for Sports Seat Type)

s2.ptxt: Using hog ring pliers, install the front separate type seat back cover to the front seat back pad with 14 new hog rings.

item.ptxt: Be careful not to damage the cover.
When installing the hog rings, take care to minimize wrinkles as much as possible.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL SEPARATE TYPE FRONT SEAT BACK ASSEMBLY
INSTALL FRONT SEAT BACK BOARD SUB-ASSEMBLY
INSTALL FRONT INNER SEAT CUSHION SHIELD
INSTALL FRONT SEAT INNER BELT ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install the front seat inner belt assembly with the nut.

atten3.ptxt: Do not allow the anchor part of the front seat inner belt assembly to overlap the protruding parts of the front seat adjuster.

s2.ptxt: for Driver seat:

s3.ptxt: Connect the connectors and engage the 4 clamps.

s2.ptxt: for Passenger seat:

s3.ptxt: Connect the connector and engage the 3 clamps.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL FRONT SEAT CUSHION SHIELD ASSEMBLY
INSTALL SLIDE AND VERTICAL POWER SEAT SWITCH KNOB
INSTALL RECLINING POWER SEAT SWITCH KNOB

s2.ptxt: Place the seat in the cabin.
Connect the connectors under the seat.
Connect the cable to the negative (-) battery terminal.
Move the front seat assembly fully forward by operating the slide and vertical power seat switch knob.

atten3.ptxt: Check that the seat is locked.

s2.ptxt: Temporarily install the front side of the front seat assembly with the 2 bolts.
Move the front seat assembly fully forward by operating the slide and vertical power seat switch knob.

atten3.ptxt: Check that the seat is locked.

s2.ptxt: Temporarily install the rear side of the front seat assembly with the 2 bolts.
Move the front seat assembly to the rearmost position by operating the slide and vertical power seat switch knob.

atten3.ptxt: Check that the seat is locked.

s2.ptxt: Fully tighten the 2 bolts on the front side of the front seat assembly in the order of the inner side bolt and then the outer side bolt.
Move the front seat assembly fully forward by operating the slide and vertical power seat switch knob.

atten3.ptxt: Check that the seat is locked.

s2.ptxt: Fully tighten the 2 bolts on the rear side of the front seat assembly in the order of the inner side bolt and then the outer side bolt.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL INNER SEAT TRACK BRACKET COVER

s2.ptxt: Slide the inner seat track bracket cover along the seat rail toward the front of the vehicle. Engage claw A to the seat rail.
Push the inner seat track bracket cover to engage claw B.
Slide the seat track cover along the seat rail toward the front of the vehicle. Engage claw A to the seat rail.
Push the seat track cover to engage claw B.
